title: Trend persistence with four-hour confirmation
plain_language_summary_zh: 研究一小时趋势在四小时方向确认后是否更稳定，重点是信息增益而非收益承诺。
falsifiable_hypothesis: When the 4h direction agrees with a 1h continuation signal, forward 1h directional persistence is higher than the unfiltered baseline on approved Development data.
proposed_market_mechanism: Cross-timeframe agreement may identify inventory adjustment that persists beyond a single hourly bar.
supporting_evidence: The frozen current research state identifies temporal generalization as unresolved.
contradictory_evidence: Delayed confirmation may select moves that are already exhausted.

source_refs.claim: The frozen state records approved Development scope and unresolved temporal questions.

novelty_vs_existing_research: Tests a mechanism-level confirmation filter without changing the approved risk contract.
minimal_test_method: Compare pre-declared continuation labels with and without 4h agreement on the approved BTC/ETH Development snapshots.
comparison_baseline: The same 1h continuation label without the 4h agreement filter.
falsification_conditions: Directional persistence is not higher than baseline on both approved pairs.
stop_conditions: Stop after the two pre-declared Development comparisons or on any scope mismatch.
known_limitations: A four-hour filter can reduce sample size and delay entry labels.
